evals.prompt: I want to add MatrixScan Batch to my Android app. Here's my empty Activity: EmptyActivity.kt. I need to scan EAN-13 and QR barcodes. Please show me the complete updated Activity code in your response.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads integration.md, fetches the latest SDK version, returns complete BarcodeBatch integration code inline (DataCaptureContext, Camera, BarcodeBatch.forDataCaptureContext, DataCaptureView, BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay, BarcodeBatchListener with onSessionUpdated, lifecycle), and shows the setup checklist.

assertions.text: Setup checklist is shown and mentions adding com.scandit.datacapture:barcode and com.scandit.datacapture:core Gradle dependencies
Setup checklist mentions adding CAMERA permission to AndroidManifest.xml
Setup checklist mentions requesting CAMERA permission at runtime
A license key placeholder string is present
A concrete version number is used for the dependencies (not a [version] placeholder)
BarcodeBatch.forDataCaptureContext( is used (not a direct BarcodeBatch constructor)
DataCaptureView.newInstance( is used and set as the content view
onSessionUpdated signature has parameters (mode: BarcodeBatch, session: BarcodeBatchSession, data: FrameData)
onSessionUpdated dispatches UI work via runOnUiThread

evals.prompt: I want to highlight EAN-13 barcodes in green and CODE128 barcodes in blue in my MatrixScan Batch Activity. Here is my Activity: IntegratedActivity.kt
evals.expected_output: The skill implements BarcodeBatchBasicOverlayListener, overrides brushForTrackedBarcode to return colored brushes per symbology, and assigns the listener to the overlay.

assertions.text: Existing integration code (BarcodeBatch, DataCaptureView, BarcodeBatchListener, camera lifecycle) is preserved

evals.prompt: In my MatrixScan Batch Activity I want to log all currently tracked barcodes — their tracking ID and data — on every frame. Here is my Activity: IntegratedActivity.kt
evals.expected_output: The skill updates onSessionUpdated to iterate over session.trackedBarcodes, log each TrackedBarcode's identifier and barcode.data.

assertions.text: Data is copied out of the session before runOnUiThread (session.trackedBarcodes is not accessed inside the UI lambda)
Existing integration code (BarcodeBatch factory, camera setup, overlay, lifecycle) is preserved
